name: ADVANCED MICRO DEVICES INC
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) designs high-performance and AI computing products including CPUs, GPUs, FPGAs, APUs, DPUs, AI NICs, and adaptive SoCs. AMD serves data center, client computing, gaming, and embedded markets. Key product lines include EPYC server processors, Instinct AI accelerators, Radeon GPUs, Ryzen AI client processors, and Xilinx-derived FPGA/adaptive SoC solutions. AMD also develops software stacks including the open ROCm AI platform and delivers full-stack rack-scale AI infrastructure solutions.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
